reviews.comment:
Muy.buena atención del personal, sanitarios en óptimas condiciones. Solo crítico la mañana conexión de Internet al momento de usar la aplicación de YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff, restrooms in excellent condition. The only criticism was the internet connection in the morning when using the YPF app.

reviews.comment:
Comodo, sencillo, con lo necesario para pasar una noche y desayunar. Buenos precios y cochera cubierta pegada a la habitacion.

(Translated by Google)
Comfortable, simple, with everything you need for a night's stay and breakfast. Good prices and covered parking right next to the room.
